message:
Refine SSI validation, VDBE engine, and trim golden baseline data

Cross-cutting improvements to the MVCC, VDBE, parser, and harness
layers with significant reduction in golden baseline data volume:

MVCC:
- ssi_validation.rs: +94 lines refining SSI cycle detection and
  validation logic with improved abort-reason classification
- witness_refinement.rs: minor witness tracking adjustment

VDBE & parser:
- engine.rs: +391/-391 lines restructuring execution paths for
  cleaner control flow and reduced state tracking
- semantic.rs: +27 lines expanding semantic analysis rules

Harness & conformance:
- core_sql_golden_blake3.json: trimmed golden baseline data
  (-4214 lines) reflecting stabilized test vector set
- bd_19u_4_nitrosketch_telemetry.rs: +35 lines telemetry test updates
- bd_1lsfu_2_core_sql_golden_checksums.rs: checksum test adjustments
- bd_1p75_retry_policy_beta_bernoulli_compliance.rs: +25 lines
  retry policy compliance test refinements

Other:
- epoch.rs: -4 lines removing unused epoch utilities
- wasm.rs: +10 lines WASM bindings expansion
- runtime_stub_inventory.toml: trimmed stub inventory

Note: arc_cache.rs deletion excluded pending review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
